//: Metadata step: compile plugins/Ofs.Api and extract its /// XML comments into api/*.yml.

metadata.//enumSortOrder: Keep enum members in source order so value-carrying enums (e.g. NodeIcon, StandardAxis) render in ABI order, not alphabetized.
metadata.//filter: Strip inherited System.Object/ValueType members (Equals/GetHashCode/ToString/…) from every type page.

//build: Build step: render the generated api/ reference plus the hand-written landing page.

resource.//: Pull the app logo straight from data/icons into the site root — no committed duplicate.
